## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix

## Checklist

- [ ] `make check` passes (kernel changes)
- [ ] `make tests` passes (or targeted pytest paths for small fixes — note which)
- [ ] Open-core boundary respected (`make check-boundary`; no `enterprise/` imports from kernel)
- [ ] Tests added or updated for behavior changes
- [ ] Docs updated (`docs/` and/or `website/` build if links or API surface changed)
